nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Pycnonotus
nodes.summary: Pycnonotus（Pycnonotus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联31种鸟类，如Spot-necked bulbul、Asian red-eyed bulbul、Olive-winged bulbul等31种鸟类。

nodes.name: Streak-eared bulbul
nodes.summary: Streak-eared bulbul（Pycnonotus conradi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Streak-eared bulbul。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Streak-eared bulbul
nodes.summary: The streak-eared bulbul (Pycnonotus conradi) is a member of the bulbul family of passerine birds. It is found from Thailand and northern and central Malay Peninsula to southern Indochina. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. The streak-eared bulbul was originally described in the genus Criniger. Until 2016, the streak-eared bulbul was considered to be conspecific with the Ayeyarwady bulbul while still using the name 'streak-eared bulbul' (as Pycnonotus blanfordi). Diet It is a frugivore. References
